title: NEED HELP - How to Export Board Items into Document to send for eSignature
excerpt: Need help figuring out how to export information from a board into a Document template that we then send out to our customer to sign.

posts.author: jmkst26 (Jordan)
posts.cookedHtml: Need help figuring out how to export information from a board into a Document template that we then send out to our customer to sign.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jmkst26

Have a look at the Panda Doc app in the Marketplace on your monday.com account. Sounds like that’s the sort of thing you’re after. Let us know if you need a hand with anything!

teameasy@easy-mondays.com
Team Easy

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @jmkst26 GetSign monday.com eSignature solution can help you with your goal using its uper easy drag and drop experience. See the video below. Happy to help with the setup!
